prompt_text:
### Demographics: 48-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 91.2 kg; Height 178.9 cm; BMI 28.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 6.6%; 3 months ago 6.1%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 179mg/dL; 9 months ago 181mg/dL; 6 months ago 145mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 93.9kg; 9 months ago 89.2kg; 6 months ago 86.9kg; 3 months ago 85.7kg; current 91.2kg), Height (12 months ago 178.9cm; 9 months ago 178.9cm; 6 months ago 178.9cm; 3 months ago 178.9cm; current 178.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 28.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 31U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 48mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 202mg/g; 9 months ago 255mg/g; 6 months ago 231mg/g; 3 months ago 160mg/g; current 184mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 160mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.3g/dL; 3 months ago 12.7g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
